terms: A 22% service fee is added to the final invoice on top of the quoted price.
The deposit of $1,500 is non-refundable under all circumstances, including cancellation by the photographer.
Golden Hour may substitute the assigned photographer with any associate at its sole discretion, without notice.
Any dispute arising from this agreement shall be resolved exclusively in the courts of Anchorage, Alaska.
The full remaining balance is due 90 days BEFORE the event date.
Client cancellation within 180 days of the event forfeits 100% of all payments made.
This agreement renews automatically for a rebooking fee of $2,000 if the event is postponed for any reason.
Bella Vista reserves the right to host a second event on the premises on the same day.

traps.desc: 22% service fee on top of quoted price
deposit kept even if the PHOTOGRAPHER cancels
photographer can be swapped without notice
full balance due 90 days before the event
venue may host a second event the same day
